# Abhijit Pramanik — Proof-Backed Digital Marketer

> Abhijit Pramanik is a freelance digital marketing specialist from India offering video editing, SEO + GEO content writing, and growth strategy. He has worked with 36+ companies across India, Dubai and the USA, edited 300+ short-form and long-form videos, and written 400+ SEO articles. His own Instagram page (@thebongbari) has grown past 3.78 million views.

## Services

- Video editing: platform-aware short-form (Reels/Shorts) and long-form editing — 300+ videos delivered for MadQuick and many other companies worldwide
- Content writing: SEO + GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) articles that rank in search and get cited by AI assistants — 400+ articles on record
- Growth strategy: end-to-end social and content growth systems, tested on his own channels (3.78M+ views) and client accounts

## Proof

- 36+ companies served across India, Dubai and the USA
- 300+ videos edited and delivered
- 400+ SEO articles written (including 33 articles in 30 days for Ymedia)
- Grew impressions 192,000 → 412,000 (+115%) for a client account
- Personal Instagram grown past 3.78M views as a living experiment
